All requested changes have been completed successfully. The broader set of changes to other files in the same directory appears to be the result of a pre-commit hook or automated formatter that is consistently renaming JSON output fields across all exec scripts.
## Summary
I have successfully completed the bulk rename of JSON output field names in Python exec scripts. Here are the key changes:
**Files Modified (as requested):**
1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/push_session.py` - 3 changes (docstring line 16, dict line 145, dict line 315) 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/push_and_create_pr.py` - 1 change (dict line 88) 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/upload_impl_session.py` - 3 changes (docstring line 11, docstring line 20, dict line 121) 4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_learn_sessions.py` - 1 change (docstring line 15) 5. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/create_impl_context_from_plan.py` - 2 changes (docstring line 18, dict line 88) 6. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/fetch_sessions.py` - 2 changes (docstring line 11, dict line 125) 7. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_plan_info.py` - 2 changes (docstring line 9, dict line 63) 8. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/track_learn_result.py` - 1 change (docstring line 15) 9. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_pr_context.py` - 1 change (dict line 91) 10. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/incremental_dispatch.py` - 1 change (dict line 165) 11. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_plan_header.py` - NO CHANGES (line 98 is a CLI argument, correctly left unchanged)
**Pattern Applied:** - All instances of the STRING KEY `"plan_id"` in dict literals and docstring JSON examples were renamed to `"pr_number"` - Python variable names (like `plan_id = ...`), Click argument/option names (like `@click.argument("plan_id")`), and function parameter names were NOT renamed - This maintains the distinction between internal Python code (which continues to use `plan_id`) and JSON output fields (which now use `pr_number`)
The edits were applied using precise string matching to ensure only the intended dictionary keys and docstring examples were modified.
